prerequisites: A Qualaroo account that exposes the REPORTING API section under Account Details, where your API credentials are shown.

Your Qualaroo API Key and API Secret, found on the Qualaroo dashboard under User ID (top-right), then Account Details, then the REPORTING API section. These map to the connector's required 'key' and 'token' fields.
A 'start_date' value expressed as UNIX time in seconds, used to filter survey responses returned by the API.

Optionally, one or more Qualaroo survey IDs for the 'survey_ids' field. A survey's ID appears in the URL when you edit that survey on the Qualaroo dashboard; if omitted, the connector can target your available surveys.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic Authentication (API Key and API Secret)
authMethods.summary: The Qualaroo REST Reporting API uses HTTP Basic Authentication over SSL. Supply your API Key in the connector's 'key' field and your API Secret in the 'token' field. Because all requests are made over SSL, the credentials are encrypted in transit. Both fields are required and stored as secrets.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Qualaroo API Key and API Secret
setupSteps.body: Log in to Qualaroo. Click your User ID at the top-right of the dashboard and open Account Details. Scroll down to the REPORTING API section, where your API Key and API Secret are displayed. You need both values to authenticate.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the Qualaroo API Key into the required 'key' field and the API Secret into the required 'token' field. The connector sends these via HTTP Basic Authentication over SSL when calling the REST Reporting API.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required 'start_date' field to the earliest point from which to pull survey responses. Qualaroo expects this as UNIX time (an integer number of seconds), which the API uses to filter the returned response records.

setupSteps.title: Optionally scope to specific surveys
setupSteps.body: To limit extraction to particular surveys, populate the optional 'survey_ids' field. Find a survey's ID in the URL shown when you edit that survey on the Qualaroo dashboard; this is the SURVEY_ID used in the API path /api/v1/nudges/SURVEY_ID/responses.json. Leave it empty to avoid restricting to specific surveys.

sources.title: The REST Reporting API: What It Is & How to Use It - Qualaroo
